mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fill_task (public_id, user_id, document_set_id, template_id, mode, user_requirement, status, result_file_path, created_at, finished_at, error_message, version, ai_remote_task_id, ai_provider, ai_model, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, ai_cost, ai_cost_currency, ai_cost_estimated, ai_usage_raw) VALUES (#{publicId}, #{userId}, #{documentSetId}, #{templateId}, #{mode}, #{userRequirement}, #{status}, #{resultFilePath}, #{createdAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{errorMessage}, 0, #{aiRemoteTaskId}, #{aiProvider}, #{aiModel}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{aiCost}, #{aiCostCurrency}, #{aiCostEstimated}, #{aiUsageRaw})
mapper.update:
UPDATE fill_task SET status = #{status}, finished_at = NULL, error_message = NULL, result_file_path = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
AND version = #{version}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM fill_task WHERE public_id IN
#{pid}

SELECT * FROM fill_task WHERE status = 'SUCCESS' AND result_file_path IS NOT NULL AND result_file_path != '' AND finished_at IS NOT NULL AND finished_at < #{cutoff} ORDER BY finished_at ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE fill_task SET result_file_path = NULL, error_message = #{message}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE fill_task SET status = #{toStatus}, finished_at = NULL, result_file_path = NULL, error_message = #{message}, ai_remote_task_id = NULL, ai_provider = NULL, ai_model = NULL, input_tokens = NULL, output_tokens = NULL, total_tokens = NULL, ai_cost = NULL, ai_cost_currency = NULL, ai_cost_estimated = NULL, ai_usage_raw = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN (#{fromStatus1}, #{fromStatus2})
UPDATE fill_task SET status = #{cancelledStatus}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, error_message = #{message}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN (#{status1}, #{status2})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM fill_task WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND created_at IS NOT NULL AND created_at < #{cutoff} ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE fill_task SET status = #{timeoutStatus}, error_message = #{message}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RUNNING'
mapper.sql: COALESCE( ai_cost, CASE WHEN ( (input_tokens IS NOT NULL AND input_tokens > 0 AND #{defaultInputPer1k} IS NOT NULL AND #{defaultInputPer1k} > 0) OR (output_tokens IS NOT NULL AND output_tokens > 0 AND #{defaultOutputPer1k} IS NOT NULL AND #{defaultOutputPer1k} > 0) ) THEN ( COALESCE(input_tokens, 0) * #{defaultInputPer1k} / 1000 + COALESCE(output_tokens, 0) * #{defaultOutputPer1k} / 1000 ) ELSE NULL END )
